title: The Most Technological Experience
description: Play Gregtech but w/o gregtech. Minecraft 1.20.1. Questing Modpack.
body:
# The Most Technological Experience

The Most Technological Experience (TMTE) is an expert/Gregtech questing modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, But without gregtech. TMTE Nerfed some recipe. TMTE changes and adds recipes to combine Create And Mekanism, it also adds custom items to the game, using Kubejs.

This modpack uses the mod(s) from CurseForge. Here Are the Mods: 
  [KubeJS Mekanism UNOFFICIAL](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kubejs-mekanism-unofficial)

  Some of the Textures go to [[GregTechCEU Modern](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern), Mekanism, and Create. (Mekanism and Create is Included in this modpack.)
